overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia descending a forested mountain trail toward a rocky coastline during a dramatic pink sunset. The character transitions from a narrow wooded path to walking along the shoreline as the sky turns vivid purple and magenta.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail descending to coast

events.description: sky begins transitioning from blue daylight to vivid pink and purple sunset hues

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking down a rocky mountain path surrounded by coniferous trees, heading toward the coastline visible in the distance

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation on the left side of the trail
dense pine and fir trees lining the right side of the descending path
narrow rocky dirt path winding down the mountainside
distant blue ocean visible through gaps in the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends a narrow mountain trail through dense coniferous forest with rocky cliffs to the left. The path is uneven and natural, with the ocean visible as a blue strip in the distance. The lighting shifts from daylight to pink sunset hues as the character progresses downhill.

events.description: character emerges from forested trail onto the open rocky beach shoreline
sun becomes fully visible on the horizon, casting intense pink and magenta light across the scene

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the environment opens up to the beach, with the setting sun creating a brilliant pink glow over the ocean

entered.detail: calm sea water becoming visible as the forest canopy opens up
gravel and stone shoreline replacing the dirt mountain path
bright pink sun low on the horizon creating dramatic backlighting and lens flare
large rocky outcropping visible in the ocean distance

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a wide rocky beach with the ocean on the left. The sky transforms into vivid pink and purple as the sun sets on the right, backlighting the scene. Geralt walks onto the gravel shore as the terrain transitions from enclosed trail to open coastline.

events.description: character begins walking along the water's edge where gentle waves meet the rocky shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the rocky beach shoreline with waves lapping at the shore to his left and forested cliffs receding to his right

entered.detail: scattered logs and driftwood debris on the rocky beach
shallow pools of water among the rocks along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the rocky beach as the sun sets brilliantly in pink and purple hues. The ocean is now close on the left with visible waves, while the forested coastline stretches into the distance on the right. The character walks along the waterline, passing driftwood and tidal pools.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character descends from a dense mountain forest toward a wide, vivid coastline under a deepening sunset. It begins on a narrow, uneven trail flanked by coniferous trees and rocky cliffs, with the distant ocean appearing as a thin blue strip. As the character progresses downhill, the forest opens up to reveal a rocky beach, while the lighting shifts from daylight into brilliant pink and purple hues that backlight the landscape. The scene then expands onto the gravel shore, where the enclosed trail gives way to an open horizon of crashing waves and a glowing sky. Finally, the camera follows the character along the waterline, passing driftwood and tidal pools as the forested coastline stretches away into the distance.
